<think>I've opened DOC3_A6 and found the exact data I need. The document shows:

"流动资产合计|12,619,142,541.18|10,819,392,939.45"

This means the Total Current Assets (流动资产合计) for this company (Suzhou Tianhua New Energy Technology Co., Ltd.) is 12,619,142,541.18 yuan, which is clearly above 6,000,000,000 (6 billion).
